stemHtml: Which statement about the content of continuous VOLMET messages(VHF) and scheduled VOLMET messages(HF) is correct?

options.a: Both types of VOLMET messages contain trend forecasts, where available.
options.b: A continuous VOLMET contains information from the TAF.
options.c: Forecast information e.g. a trend or TAF, is prohibited in VOLMETs.
options.d: TAFs are included in both VOLMET messages.
